logs.message: AdInsights.Infrastructure depends on CassandraCSharpDriver (>= 3.21.1) but CassandraCSharpDriver 3.21.1 was not found. CassandraCSharpDriver 3.22.0 was resolved instead.
Package 'OpenTelemetry.Exporter.Jaeger' 1.5.1 has a known moderate severity vulnerability, https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-38h3-2333-qx47
